output:
**The box.**

Emma was never present to witness any of the key's movements throughout the story. When George moved the key from the box to the office, Emma was far away at the elephant information board. When David later retrieved it from the office and returned it to the box, Emma was at the parrot interaction session. Since she has no knowledge of any relocations, she would default to looking in the key's usual, publicly known location — the box.
